description:
(I tried to explain and cover the correct path(s), I'll add more wrong paths later - Don't try to solve it if you want to know why u failed.. in case u do, that is;)

It's not that it's the first time I see it but from now on I'll never forget.. :)

(;AB[bn]AB[cn]AB[co]AB[dp]AB[dq]AB[fq]AW[bo]AW[cp]AW[cq]AW[bq]C[It's a wonderful tsumego. Surely anyone can find the obvious ko but can you do better - Can you kill ***unconditionally***?]AP[goproblems]
(;B[ds]
(;W[cr]C[Landing with a tobi? Your mind works in a misterious way... ;)]

(;B[an]C[Well done! The tobi (D1) is indeed a spectacular move making the two 1x2 points miai, rendering whites resistance futile.CHOICERIGHT])
